title: git_diff
description: Show changes between git commits, branches, or the working tree as a unified diff.

ref_a.description: First git ref (commit hash, branch, or tag). Omit to use the working tree.

ref_b.description: Second git ref to compare against. Omit to compare ref_a against the working tree.

staged.description: If true, show staged (index) changes instead of unstaged changes.

file_path.description: Limit the diff to a specific file or directory path.
